info.name: TIP Platform — Unified Collection
info.description:
Every endpoint of every TIP service in one place.

**Auth flow**: a pre-request script on the root folder calls POST /login on {{authUrl}} with {{adminUsername}} / {{adminPassword}} and caches the access token in {{accessToken}}. All requests use it automatically.

**Hosts**: each service has its own {{baseUrlXxx}} variable. Edit them once for remote deploys (e.g. http://lightserv1.local:8000).

exec: // TIP — auto-login as admin if accessToken is empty.
// Set {{adminUsername}} and {{adminPassword}} as collection / environment variables.

item.name: auth (8000)
item.description: JWT issuance, RBAC, sessions, and service identity

item.name: threat-intel (8003)
item.description: Supply chain threats, HIBP breaches, public disclosures

item.name: threat-actors (8005)
item.description: Threat actor library — MITRE ATT&CK, ransomware groups, tools and TTPs

request.description: Scheduler trigger: incremental refresh (MITRE + groups + recent victims).
First-boot / reconciliation trigger: full historical pull (~80k victims).
Returns actors that use the given ATT&CK technique.

item.name: integrations (8006)
item.description: Wazuh SIEM and MISP threat sharing integration

request.description: Push specific IOCs to MISP (or all high-confidence ones if list is empty).

item.name: flowviz (8008)
item.description: Threat description → ATT&CK attack flow (nodes & edges)

request.description: Returns a Server-Sent Events stream of the raw AI output.

item.name: asm (8009)
item.description: Passive attack surface discovery — cert transparency, passive DNS, Shodan

item.name: domainwatch (8010)
item.description: Periodic domain monitoring — DNS, content hash, screenshots, IOC lookup

item.name: scheduler (8011)
item.description: Central job scheduler — fires HTTP triggers to all platform services

request.description: Called by slow jobs to report completion.

item.name: secrets (8012)
item.description: Fernet-encrypted credential vault with access logging

request.description:
Validates the service's bootstrap token then returns the requested secret(s).

Two modes:
- body.secret_name provided → single-secret mode: returns {"value": "<plaintext>"}
- body.secret_name absent  → bulk mode (auth only): returns RS256 keypair dict

item.name: indicator-intel (8013)
item.description: AI-driven passive investigation of IPs and domains

item.name: orchestrator (8014)
item.description: AI intelligence synthesis — CVE relevance, actor likelihood, correlations, executive briefs
